evals.name: coffee-roastery
evals.prompt: I need a brutalist landing page for my specialty coffee roastery called Ember & Ash. Dark theme, earthy tones. We do single-origin beans from Ethiopia and Colombia. $18-24 per bag, subscription available at $15/bag.
evals.expected_output: A brutalist dark-themed landing page with earthy colors, specific pricing, no design confirmation step (clear aesthetic), proper JSON-LD and OG tags

assertions.name: has-css-root-tokens
assertions.description: HTML contains a :root block with CSS custom properties (--color-*, --font-*)

assertions.name: has-og-tags
assertions.description: HTML contains og:title, og:description, and twitter:card meta tags

assertions.name: has-json-ld
assertions.description: HTML contains a script type=application/ld+json block with schema.org structured data

assertions.name: has-pricing
assertions.description: HTML contains the specific prices from the prompt ($18, $24, $15 or equivalent)

assertions.name: no-anti-slop
assertions.description: No purple/violet gradients, no glowing box-shadows, no uppercase FEATURES/HOW IT WORKS labels with letter-spacing

assertions.name: under-200kb
assertions.description: File size is under 200KB (204800 bytes)

assertions.name: has-skip-link
assertions.description: HTML contains an accessibility skip-to-content link

assertions.name: has-prefers-reduced-motion
assertions.description: CSS contains prefers-reduced-motion media query

assertions.name: uses-google-fonts
assertions.description: Loads Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com) and does NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Arial as primary fonts

assertions.name: semantic-html
assertions.description: Uses semantic elements: <header>, <main>, <section>, <footer>

evals.name: dog-walking-app
evals.prompt: Build me a landing page for a dog walking app called PawPals
evals.expected_output: A landing page with a proposed design direction (ambiguous prompt), distinctive non-generic design, realistic content with testimonials and specific details

assertions.description: HTML contains a script type=application/ld+json block with schema.org structured data

assertions.name: has-skip-link
assertions.description: HTML contains an accessibility skip-to-content link

assertions.name: has-prefers-reduced-motion
assertions.description: CSS contains prefers-reduced-motion media query

assertions.name: uses-google-fonts
assertions.description: Loads Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com) and does NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Arial as primary fonts

evals.name: piano-teacher
evals.prompt: Create a website for my piano teaching business. I'm Sarah Chen, I teach in Portland, OR. Been teaching 12 years, beginners through advanced, ages 6+. $65/hour private, $45/hour group. Studio in the Pearl District.
evals.expected_output: A landing page with LocalBusiness JSON-LD, specific pricing, OG tags, concise copy following length defaults, warm/inviting design

assertions.name: has-css-root-tokens
assertions.description: HTML contains a :root block with CSS custom properties (--color-*, --font-*)

assertions.name: has-og-tags
assertions.description: HTML contains og:title, og:description, and twitter:card meta tags

assertions.name: has-json-ld-local-business
assertions.description: HTML contains JSON-LD with @type LocalBusiness (or MusicSchool or similar local type)

assertions.name: has-pricing
assertions.description: HTML contains both prices ($65 and $45) from the prompt

assertions.name: has-specific-details
assertions.description: HTML mentions Portland, Pearl District, Sarah Chen, and 12 years of experience

assertions.name: no-anti-slop
assertions.description: No purple/violet gradients, no glowing box-shadows, no uppercase FEATURES/HOW IT WORKS labels with letter-spacing

assertions.name: under-200kb
assertions.description: File size is under 200KB (204800 bytes)

assertions.name: has-skip-link
assertions.description: HTML contains an accessibility skip-to-content link

assertions.name: has-prefers-reduced-motion
assertions.description: CSS contains prefers-reduced-motion media query

assertions.name: uses-google-fonts
assertions.description: Loads Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com) and does NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Arial as primary fonts
